$description: Figma-binding type scale (figma-parity-reconciliation ADR; research F1). The Figma Foundations/Type & Metrics layer is the binding source: role-named scale display/title/body/body-strong/label/meta/caption/mono replaces the prior px-purpose text-* scale. Each role carries fontSize and lineHeight (rem; the rem-px basis is 16px). fontWeight is the role's bound weight; fontFamily binds Inter for text roles and JetBrains Mono for the mono role. These emit as --text-fg-* CSS custom properties via the non-color token pipeline (style-dictionary.config.ts); the legacy --text-* names remain as deprecated aliases until the W02/W03 view rewrite cuts usages over (W04 removes them).

family.$description: Bound font families (figma-parity-reconciliation ADR): Inter for UI/text roles, JetBrains Mono for the code/identity mono role, replacing the prior system stack.

sans.$value: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif

mono.$value: "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, "SF Mono", "Cascadia Code", Menlo, Consolas, monospace

serif.$value: Fraunces, Georgia, "Times New Roman", "Noto Serif", serif

role.$description: Figma role-named type scale. Sizes/line-heights are the binding Foundations/Type & Metrics values (research F1): display 20/28, title 15/22, label 12/16, meta 11/14, mono 11. body is the dashboard primary text 13/20; body-strong shares body's metrics at the bound medium weight; caption is the dense metadata role 10/14.

display.$description: Largest headline role; binding Figma display 20/28.

title.$description: Panel/rail heading role; binding Figma title 16/24 (legibility bump). Maps to the legacy text-heading (NOT the legacy 13px text-title) - see the text-title vs text-heading collision guard, research F1.

body.$description: Primary UI text role; binding Figma body 14/22 (legibility bump).

body-strong.$description: Emphasis variant of body at the bound medium weight; shares body's metrics (14/22). Covers the prior text-title section-label use (medium weight).

label.$description: Form/control label role; binding Figma label 13/18 (legibility bump).

meta.$description: Timestamp/caption/pill role; binding Figma meta 12/16 (legibility bump).

caption.$description: Dense metadata role; binding Figma caption 11/16 (legibility bump).

mono.$description: Code/identity role (hashes, byte spans, provenance keys, paths); binding Figma mono 12 (legibility bump), in JetBrains Mono.
